name: Union Search
summary: Unified multi-platform search solution — one command to reach 30+ platforms including GitHub, Twitter, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, Douyin, and more
description: Union Search is a production-ready CLI tool that aggregates search results from 30+ platforms with a single unified interface. It supports developer communities (GitHub, Reddit, Zhihu), social media (Twitter, Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Bilibili), search engines (Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave), AI-powered search (Tavily, Metaso), and 18 image search platforms. Features include automatic fallback channels, concurrent search, result filtering, and multiple output formats (JSON/Markdown/Text).
install: git clone https://github.com/runningZ1/union-search-skill && cd union-search-skill && pip install -r requirements.txt
author: runningZ1
features: 30+ search platforms with unified CLI interface
Automatic fallback when primary channels fail
18 image search platforms with batch download

usage_examples.title: Image search and download
usage_examples.command: python union_search_cli.py image "landscape" --platforms google bing pixabay --limit 20 --output-dir ./images

highlights: 🌐 Most comprehensive platform coverage (30+) compared to other open-source projects
⚡ Standardized output format across all platforms
🛡️ Production-ready with error handling and rate limiting
use_cases: Social media listening and brand monitoring
